ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the stock belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange (e.g., New York, London) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the exchange operates */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" TEXT /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "percent_from_mean" TEXT /* Percentage of the stock price from the mean price */,
  "pre_market_price" TEXT /* Pre-market trading price */,
  "after_market_price" TEXT /* After-market trading price */,
  "change_percent" TEXT /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "change_amount" TEXT /* Amount change in the stock price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" TEXT /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Name of the firm the analyst belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the analyst */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise */,
  "seniority" TEXT /* Seniority level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analyst information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "rec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst making the recommendation */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., Buy, Sell, Hold) */,
  "target_price" TEXT /* Target price of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recommendation */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale for the recommendation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" TEXT /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" TEXT /* Current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Full name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the client (e.g., Investor, Analyst) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the client */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the client information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the configuration */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., grid, chart) */,
  "stocks" TEXT /* List of stocks displayed on the dashboard */,
  "theme" TEXT /* Theme of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* List of widgets displayed on the dashboard */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dashboard configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboard_configurations_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news feed (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the news article */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the news feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)
